workOrder.title: Remove unsupported global-only audit navigation for site admins

selectionReason: Current source still exposed site-admin Audit and Archive / Exports navigation plus a Site Dashboard Recent Activity action even though only Global Admin users load the backing admin dashboard data. Removing those dead-end affordances was the safest next product-readiness slice because it improves navigation honesty without adding routes, permissions, mutations, or fake functionality.
userFacingImprovement: Site-admin workspaces no longer route into unavailable Audit or Archive / Exports sections, and Recent Activity stays an honest summary count until a real site-scoped audit surface exists.
privacyAndPermissionNotes: No auth, RBAC, tenant, site, program, mentor, or student visibility rules changed.
No site-scoped audit route was added; the slice only removes unsupported navigation and keeps summary data honest.
No mutation controls, secrets, migrations, deployment settings, or live data were touched.

candidateSummary.decision: deferred; hosted fake-account and audit writes are not allowed in this lane
deferred; route shape and visibility review still needed
deferred; backend queue rows are absent
not selected; shareable need remains unproven
not selected; shareable need remains unproven
rejected; mutation policy needs more review
rejected; mutation policy is not approved
deferred; threshold policy is still unclear
rejected; aggregate backend design is absent
deferred; write-path and product design are still needed
rejected; completed in the prior run

validation.notes: Focused workspace coverage plus the full verifier/check/test stack passed; git diff --check reported only CRLF normalization warnings.

doNotRepeat: Do not re-add site-admin Audit or Archive / Exports navigation unless a real backed site-scoped surface exists and focused coverage proves it.

ladderHandoff.evidence: Site-admin workspaces no longer render unsupported audit/export sections, and Site Dashboard Recent Activity now stays summary-only when no backed audit surface exists.
ladderHandoff.unlocks: A future site-scoped audit destination can be added deliberately instead of leaving dead-end navigation in place.
ladderHandoff.next: Run hosted section-level permission proof when allowed; otherwise review a safe site-scoped audit destination before restoring any audit navigation for site admins.
ladderHandoff.blockers: Hosted proof needs safe fake-account/audit runtime; site-scoped audit route shape still needs visibility review; missing-submission queue rows do not exist; archive retry/regenerate needs mutation policy.
